claudeResult.resultText:
Done! I've built your CI status dashboard with:

**KPI Metrics Row:**
- Build Pass Rate: 94% (up trend)
- Avg Build Time: 4m12s (flat trend)
- Open Incidents: 2 (down trend)

**Charts:**
- **Build Durations** — bar chart showing minutes over the last 7 days (peak on Friday at 20 min)
- **Daily Deploys** — line chart showing deploy counts over the last 7 days (peak on Saturday with 7 deploys)

All composed in a vertical Stack with a 2-column Grid for the charts. View at: http://localhost:7811/?session=0ad4b2be-9d4d-4007-8d07-da6b3c660db1
